hallucinations.description: Multiple references to papers from 2025 (e.g., Wen et al. 2025, Ye et al. 2025, Mulchandani and Kim 2025, Srinivasan and Seemakurthy 2024) that do not exist in the literature. These appear fabricated to fill related work sections.
hallucinations.evidence: References 11-14 and 2.2 section: 'Elastic Representation (ElRep) [Wen et al., 2025]', 'Evidential Alignment [Ye et al., 2025]', 'Mulchandani and Kim [2025]', 'Srinivasan and Seemakurthy [2024]'

overall_assessment: Hallucinations found: several nonexistent/future-dated citations. Methodology, math, and experimental results appear consistent with provided code and plots (no faked results or major methodological mismatches detected).
